title: hellenia aquatica
intro: Hellenia aquatica, also known as water aloe or water hawthorn, is a type of succulent plant native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hellenia aquatica include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal activities. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to digestive issues.
